task_description: Fix three issues in the inventaris-paud app: (1) Add admin access with 'admin' code and Netflix-style admin card on school selector, (2) Fix zone isolation bug by adding school_id to zones table and filtering per school, (3) Conditionally hide Per Zona summary in single-zone reports.

verification.summary: pnpm build compiles successfully with no TypeScript errors. pnpm lint passes cleanly. No test framework in project (test_quality skipped). No Dockerfile (docker_build skipped).
